zh.lifeSummary: 當Neil Loring於1320年4月23日出生在英國貝德福爾哈爾格拉福時，他的父親Roger Loring30歲，母親Cassandra Perrott26歲。他和Margaret Beaupel至少有2個女兒。他去世於1385年3月18日在英國貝德福爾享年64歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Neil Loring于1320年4月23日出生在英国貝德福爾哈爾格拉福时，他的父亲Roger Loring30岁，母亲Cassandra Perrott26岁。他和Margaret Beaupel至少有2个女儿。他去世于1385年3月18日在英国貝德福爾享年64岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Loring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name from Old French Lohereng ‘man fromLorraine’ (see Lorraine ).

variants.name: Lorne
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the district of Lorn (Argyll).
English: perhaps a shortened form of Loring , a surname which is well evidenced in medieval southwestern England, where Lorne is later recorded.

variants.name: Lorraine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Perrine, Pierre.

French and English: habitational name from Lorraine, a region in the northeastern part of France. Its name derives from the name of the medieval kingdom of Lotharingia, which in turn was named for its sovereign Lothar (a personal name composed of the elements hlūd ‘famous, renowned’ + hari, heri ‘army’).
Altered form of French   Lorrain  , a variant of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Neil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

variants.name: Neale
meanings: Anglicized form of the enduringly popular Gaelic name   Niall .  From the Middle Ages onwards, this name was found mainly in Ireland, the Highlands of Scotland, and the English-Scottish Border region. However, since the 20th century it has spread to enjoy considerable popularity in all parts of the English-speaking world, although in England it has recently been overtaken by the Gaelic form.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Neil Loring was born on 23 April 1320, in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Roger Loring, was 30 and his mother, Cassandra Perrott, was 26. He had at least 2 daughters with Margaret Beaupel. He died on 18 March 1385, in Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Neil Loring est né le 23 avril 1320, à Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Loring, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Cassandra Perrott, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Margaret Beaupel. Il est décédé le 18 mars 1385, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Neil Loring am 23. April 1320 in Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Loring 30 und seine Mutter Cassandra Perrott 26. Er hatte mit Margaret Beaupel mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. März 1385 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Neil Loring è nato il il 23 aprile 1320 nel Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Loring, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Cassandra Perrott, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figlie con Margaret Beaupel. Morì il 18 marzo 1385, nel Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Neil Loringが1320年4月23日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアチャルグラブで生まれた時，父Roger Loringは30歳，母Cassandra Perrottは26歳であった。彼はMargaret Beaupelとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1385年3月18日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで64歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Neil Loring(이)가 1320년 4월 23일 영국 베드퍼드실르 차그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Loring(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Cassandra Perrott(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Margaret Beaupel(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1385년 3월 18일 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.23 April 1320–18 March 1385: 23 de abril de 1320–18 de março de 1385
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Neil Loring nasceu em 23 de abril de 1320, em Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Loring, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Cassandra Perrott, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Margaret Beaupel. Ele faleceu em 18 de março de 1385, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Neil Loring родился 23 апреля 1320 г. в местности халграв, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Loring было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Cassandra Perrott, 26. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Margaret Beaupel. Он умер 18 марта 1385 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.23 April 1320–18 March 1385: 23 de abril de 1320–18 de marzo de 1385
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Neil Loring nació el 23 de abril de 1320, en Chalgrave, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Loring, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Cassandra Perrott, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Margaret Beaupel. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1385, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
